comments.author: Michael Giver
comments.body: Closing: PR #745 (https://github.com/navapbc/oscer/pull/745, Resolves #744) MERGED — Jeff Dettmann approved. docs/feature-flags.md now matches the FEATURE_* / Features-module mechanism; FF_* infra + 2023 ADR left untouched as scoped.

compiled_state.description:
GitHub: https://github.com/navapbc/oscer/issues/744

docs/feature-flags.md describes the nava-platform template's FF_* / SSM / feature_flag_overrides mechanism that OSCER never adopted. Real mechanism is the Features module (config/initializers/feature_flags.rb) reading FEATURE_<NAME> env vars; flags declared in Features::FEATURE_FLAGS (built-ins) or config/custom/feature_flags.yml (deployment-defined); per-env values via service_override_extra_environment_variables in infra/reporting-app/app-config/<env>.tf; auto-generated Features.<flag>_enabled? and with_<flag>_enabled/disabled test helpers.

Surfaced reviewing PR #739 (OSCER-737). Docs-only change. Leave FF_* infra + 2023 ADR untouched. Branch: giverm/docs-feature-flag-template-divergence.
compiled_state.title: Rewrite docs/feature-flags.md to match the real FEATURE_* / Features-module mechanism
